description: Requirements split across 5 files; tests document_id correctness.

expected.verbatim: Tenders must be submitted via the In-Tend portal only; email submissions will be rejected.
Tenderers must demonstrate minimum annual turnover of £750,000 in each of the last two audited financial years.
Daily cleaning of all public conveniences listed in Annex A including weekend coverage between April and September.
All powered equipment must be PAT tested annually with records available for inspection.
Staff must wear corporate uniform with visible photo identification at all times while on Council premises.
The Supplier must pay all contract staff at or above the Real Living Wage as published by the Living Wage Foundation.
Confirm SSIP accreditation status and provide certificate number. This is a pass/fail question.
Rates must be fixed for the first 24 months with CPI-linked adjustment permitted thereafter.
